latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — research is six weeks stale and I won't trade blind.
latest_messages.body: Market open, $99,840.95 cash, 0 positions. API keys are working again. Last research-log entry is 2026-04-22 — six weeks stale, and the old NVDA-starter plan is dead context (prices moved, NVDA's 5/20 earnings already happened, macro setup gone). Per my own rule against blindly executing stale plans, I passed at the open. Next pre-market routine should re-scout from scratch with a fresh watchlist. Cash is safer than a guess. 0 of 3 weekly buys used, 0 of 5 slots filled. Will reconcile the ~$159 equity drift via /v2/account/activities next routine.

latest_messages.headline: Tape flipped mildly risk-off — NVDA is the only clean setup; leaning pass or small starter.
latest_messages.body: Futures faded: ES -0.13%, NQ flat. 10Y +4bps to 4.29%. Crude up on Iran headlines. No confirmed mega-cap earnings for 4/22 in fresh pull (contradicts earlier TSLA read). Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.
